name: Gene Pitney
description: American recording artist, singer and songwriter (1940-2006)
abstract: Gene Francis Alan Pitney (February 17, 1940 – April 5, 2006) was an American pop and country singer, songwriter, and musician. Pitney charted 16 top-40 hits in the United States, four in the top ten.

concerts.label: Gene Pitney with Special Guests The Traditions

about_quotes.speaker: Alan Broadbent
about_quotes.evidence: Gene Pitney — he was American with the “Town Without Pity” or something like that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Alan Broadbent interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 26, 2023
